channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)

item.title: ☕ dawdadsd/Bluetooth-headset-location-software (57 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: dawdadsd

📝 Repository: dawdadsd/Bluetooth-headset-location-software

📄 Descrizione: 因为本人蓝牙耳机比较小，也没买保护壳，导致蓝牙耳机总是莫名其妙忘记带或者遗落，所以做了一个关于这个蓝牙和耳机的定位扫描器，因为各个厂商其实对于贵的耳机都是能有相应的APP定位的，但是本人的耳机是华为Freeclip2，但是本人手机是小米17Pro。无法找到，所以做了这个App，用于监听蓝牙断开时间，记录断开蓝牙时耳机的最后已知的位置，然后在家以外的地方弹出遗落提醒，回到现场之后可以通过蓝牙做近距离搜索

⭐ Stelle: 57

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T03:56:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-17T19:25:50Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ KXJ-WQL/Vision4JPC (36 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: KXJ-WQL

📝 Repository: KXJ-WQL/Vision4JPC

📄 Descrizione: Vision4JPC是一款基于SpringBoot、Vue3、Electron、Quasar的本地桌面应用开发脚手架，拥有前后端模板，支持快速二次开发与模块扩展🚀

item.title: ☕ igormsc/ai.noads.NoAdsTelegram (30 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: igormsc

📝 Repository: igormsc/ai.noads.NoAdsTelegram

📄 Descrizione: NoAdsTelegram An Xposed module for the official Telegram app that removes ads (sponsored messages, video ads), enables forwarding and saving of messages, allows saving stories, prevents message deletion (recall), and provides configurable options via preferences. Compatible only with official Telegram.
